hero_desc: Turkey's first inter-company sailing race | 3 days, 16 teams, pure competition
intro_title: Take Your Place in the Inter-Company Sailing Cup
intro_desc: Join this 3-day sailing race designed for companies. Compete with your team, meet your competitors, and enjoy an unforgettable experience.
about_desc:
You don't need to know how to sail. Each team gets an experienced helmsman.
*Helmsman: A licensed sailor who controls the boat and guides the team during the race.
about_feat1_desc: A medical team, DJ, live broadcast, and catering are with you all day.
about_feat2_desc: You race on a course overlooking the Gulf of Izmir, right in the middle of the Aegean.
step1_desc: Register your company and team easily. We will contact you within 12 hours.
step2_desc: Race rules and course information will be sent to all teams 1 week before the race.
step3_desc: A total of 36 races are held over 3 days. Each race lasts 20-30 minutes.
step4_desc: On Sunday at 4:00 PM, finish the race with an award ceremony and celebration event.
race_desc: You can find the schedule and details of the exciting races below.
race_day1_desc: We start the first day with warm-up races and a basic training course. Build your team and get ready!
race_day2_desc: An unforgettable adventure in nature awaits you on the intermediate course, where strategy and speed are most important.
race_day3_desc: The grand final race! Show your skills and win the prize in this race with all teams participating.
facility_title: The Area Where the Sailing Race Will Take Place
facility_desc: Our modern venue offers athletes a unique experience with courses specially designed for professional sailing races, accommodation areas, and social facilities. We are in the heart of nature, where the wind is most ideal.
early_title: Don't Miss the 2026 Season Sailing Race
pkg_title: Choose the Best Race Package for You
pkg1_title: Build Your Team and Enter the Race
pkg1_desc: Each team has 3 people. You can send more than one team from your company.
pkg2_title: Let's Customize the Race for Your Company
pkg2_desc: Let's organize the race completely for your company. 16 teams, 3 days, full corporate experience. Snacks and DJ included.
footer_desc: The Corporate Sailing Cup is a corporate sailing event where companies compete in teams of 3 people.
footer_copyright: © 2026 Corporate Sailing Cup. All Rights Reserved.
about_story_h2: Sailing Cup is a chance to grow, explore, and create memories that will last a lifetime in a warm and fun environment.
mission_h2: We are catching tomorrow's wind today and going beyond limits
mission_p: Our goal is not only to compete, but also to train a new generation of sailors who understand the spirit of the sea, respect nature, and value teamwork. We design every detail carefully with a sustainable approach to sport.
life_h2: A Fun Day Full of Learning and Friendship
life_p: Every day at sea is a new adventure and a chance to learn. While learning the language of the wind, we not only learn to sail, but also learn to deal with challenges, work as a team, and live in harmony with nature.
team_h2: Those Who Made the Sea and Wind a Way of Life
contact_hero_h1: Get in touch with our friendly camp team.
contact_hero_p: We are here for your questions, booking requests, or just to say hello. Reach out to us to start your sailing adventure. We can't wait to get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_form_title: Fill in the form, and we will reply to you as soon as possible.
contact_form_p: Fill in the form, and our team will get back to you with the necessary help as soon as possible.
loc_h2: See Our Other Sailing Venues on the Map
